FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Settlement cost update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the new settlements to use the new distance-based cost calculations from Routes & Resources.

patchNoteLines.li: SettlementTypeExtension_Urban and SettlementTypeExtension_Rural now extend SCSettlementTypeExtension instead of SettlementTypeExtension

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: City Need Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates the city need to use Routes & Resources updated needDef

patchNoteLines.li: Updates the city need to use Routes & Resources' updated needDef

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Founding Costs
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds specialized founding costs for each settlement type.

patchNoteLines.li: Herbalist Camp: 5 food, 4 logging, 3 mining, 3 research
Power Plant: 3 food, 4 logging, 6 mining, 2 chemfuel

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Icon Fix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Fixes a typo for the Manufactory icon.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Base mod API update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update to handle API changes in the base mod.

patchNoteLines.li: Update to handle API changes in the base mod

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Event Updates
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Removes a handful of events that are redundant or that really need a more robust/specialized implementation to make sense. The remaining events are edited and cleaned up.

patchNoteLines.li: Remove a handful of redundant or inadequate events

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: PlanetTile Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Forces PlanetTile semantics wherever possible, to eliminate the possibility of a layer clash caused by casting a PlanetTile to an int and losing layer info.

patchNoteLines.li: Updates WorldObjectComp_ToolsBenefit.RecalculateAllCities and WorldObjectComp_SeasonalProduction.InitGrowingSeason to use PlanetTile instead of int

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Empire Naming Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Updates event text to use the player's faction's name and title more, instead of generic phrases like "your empire".

patchNoteLines.li: Updates Mine Collapse event to reference the player's faction's title instead of saying "empire"

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Codex Entries
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Adds entries for the Empire Codex.
